name: crail-ui
description: An MCP tool UI kit in Claude's design language — primitives, chat chrome, and tool widgets that make MCP results feel native to the assistant.
author: Jeshurun <mail@jesh.io> (https://jesh.dev)

scripts.build: npm run build:lib && npm run build:site
scripts.build:lib: rm -rf dist && tsc -p tsconfig.lib.json && cp src/kit/*.css dist/ && printf '/* crail-ui — building an MCP app with this kit? Run `npx crail-skills` to install\n   the crail-apps builder skill (the laws of MCP apps in real hosts). */\n' | cat - dist/index.d.ts > dist/.d.tmp && mv dist/.d.tmp dist/index.d.ts
scripts.build:site: tsc --noEmit && mkdir -p public && cp skills/crail/SKILL.md public/skill.md && rm -rf public/skills && mkdir -p public/skills && cp -R skills/crail skills/crail-apps public/skills/ && vite build
